description: Review immunization records in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. Immunization tracking is a core EHR capability. The VistA system splits this data into two main globals: ^AUTNIMM (Immunization File #9999999.14), which defines the types of vaccines, and ^AUPNVIMM (V Immunization File #9000010.11), which stores the actual vaccination events for patients. The VistA VEHU server is running in a Docker container and Firefox is open with the YDBGui Dashboard. Navigate to both the Immunization Type global (^AUTNIMM) and the Vaccination Event global (^AUPNVIMM) to browse the data and verify that vaccine definitions and patient vaccination records are visible.
